cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: Harmon served as the general contractor for the commercial renovation project
cross_doc_expectations.note: Police and witness documents identify Harmon as general contractor.

cross_doc_expectations.note: External docs identify Apex as Rivera's employer.
External records consistently report March 12, 2021 for the incident.

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: not wearing required personal protective equipment
cross_doc_expectations.note: Police and witness materials state Rivera wore hard hat and harness.

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: passed all OSHA inspections conducted at the site

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: Rivera filed the instant action on March 10, 2023
